summary: Doc-only triage. User picked Patterns UI from the parked candidate list. Compared the Patterns sub-behaviors: digest detail insight + highlight sentence rendering, Today lastWeekSection summary card, DigestListView routing, Focus Suggestions, pattern-driven nudges. Selected digest detail insight + highlight sentence rendering because the 2026-05-14 app-localization-digest-insight-summary-formatting refactor (WeeklyDigest.InsightKind + structured DayHighlight + WeeklyDigestPresentationFormatting) is an active Patterns UI contract change with no UI regression proof, and the surface is bounded to one DigestDetailView sheet. Other sub-behaviors deferred to future scoped triages. Decision memo added to docs/workflows/ui-regression-plan.md under '### Batch 6 decision'. Queued implementation slice owlory-ui-regression-batch-6-patterns-digest-insight-rendering with explicit scope (seed a WeeklyDigest with InsightKind.strongWeek + structured bestDay/hardestDay, open DigestDetailView, assert localized insight sentence + best/hardest highlight summaries render).

contract_status_changes.contract: Next UI regression sub-behavior selection within Patterns UI (Batch 6)
contract_status_changes.before: Patterns UI was a parked candidate surface with no scoped triage. The 2026-05-14 digest-insight-summary-formatting refactor moved sentence composition from WeeklyDigestRules to WeeklyDigestPresentationFormatting (via WeeklyDigest.InsightKind + structured DayHighlight) but no UI regression asserted the localized sentences actually render through the new structured path.
contract_status_changes.after: Batch 6 sub-behavior explicitly selected: digest detail insight + best/hardest highlight sentence rendering. Decision memo recorded in docs/workflows/ui-regression-plan.md under '### Batch 6 decision' with a sub-behavior comparison table within Patterns UI. Implementation slice owlory-ui-regression-batch-6-patterns-digest-insight-rendering queued with explicit scope (seed WeeklyDigest with structured fields, assert localized insight + highlight sentences render), required infrastructure (digest-related accessibility identifiers, new PatternsDigestRegression class, DOMAIN=patterns matrix branch), and proof_level target running-app-smoke.

residual_risks: The implementation slice will need to seed a WeeklyDigest JSON file directly into the PatternStore.digestRepository storage path. The seed writer must mirror the file format the production code reads; getting that wrong yields a no-digest state rather than a test failure.

Asserting the best-day highlight sentence depends on calendar resolution of the seeded Date to a known weekday. The implementer should pick a fixed Date such that the rendered weekday is locale-deterministic across iOS Simulator defaults, or assert only the count substring.
The other Patterns UI sub-behaviors (lastWeekSection, DigestListView routing, Focus Suggestions, pattern-driven nudges) remain deferred; each needs its own scoped triage when prioritized.
This slice does not prove anything about running-app behavior, screenshot integrity, device behavior, or TestFlight identity. proof_level is doc-only.
recommended_next_reason: Queued behind this triage with explicit scope and required validations. The supervisor dry-run already selects it as the next eligible slice.
